notes: GPAI Risk Sources catalog from arXiv paper 2410.23472. Academic research on risk sources and management measures for general-purpose AI.

data.official_name: Risk Sources and Management Measures for General-Purpose AI
data.description: Catalog of risk sources and management measures for general-purpose AI systems, published as academic research.
data.notes: Conceptual taxonomy of risk sources identified in arXiv paper 2410.23472. Items are described by slug names representing risk categories. No formal per-item identifiers or URLs — this is an academic taxonomy, not a database with individual item pages.

data.note: Conceptual taxonomy — risk source categories are described by slug names. No per-item URLs; refer to the parent paper for full descriptions.

examples.note: Risks related to training data quality, bias, and provenance
Risks arising from deployment context and environment
Broader societal impact risks from general-purpose AI
